## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/NfT9QsENs6wmmquZJkh4Rmcc1p1HQPUt?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on RAG and AI agents content; 4 articles delivered this week, more in progress](https://fathom.video/share/NfT9QsENs6wmmquZJkh4Rmcc1p1HQPUt?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Significant spike in impressions for LLM evaluation metrics page due to recent jailbreak event](https://fathom.video/share/NfT9QsENs6wmmquZJkh4Rmcc1p1HQPUt?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [Planning to refresh and enhance top-performing articles with graphics, videos, and internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/NfT9QsENs6wmmquZJkh4Rmcc1p1HQPUt?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [Aiming to publish 20 articles by end of month; Conor to focus on reviewing backlog](https://fathom.video/share/NfT9QsENs6wmmquZJkh4Rmcc1p1HQPUt?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Review

  - [4 articles delivered this week; minor edits needed based on Adam's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/NfT9QsENs6wmmquZJkh4Rmcc1p1HQPUt?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [2 more articles being published soon; working with publisher on CMS and image templates](https://fathom.video/share/NfT9QsENs6wmmquZJkh4Rmcc1p1HQPUt?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [\~20 articles in client review; goal to clear backlog by month-end](https://fathom.video/share/NfT9QsENs6wmmquZJkh4Rmcc1p1HQPUt?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [Aiming for 20 published articles by end of month (currently \~10)](https://fathom.video/share/NfT9QsENs6wmmquZJkh4Rmcc1p1HQPUt?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Conor focusing on review process to unblock content pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/NfT9QsENs6wmmquZJkh4Rmcc1p1HQPUt?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)

### Performance Report Highlights

  - [Spike in impressions, particularly for "mastering LLM evaluation metrics" page](https://fathom.video/share/NfT9QsENs6wmmquZJkh4Rmcc1p1HQPUt?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [Spike related to Jan 4 jailbreak event; not necessarily worth chasing these specific queries](https://fathom.video/share/NfT9QsENs6wmmquZJkh4Rmcc1p1HQPUt?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [Top pages still AI agents-related; board store also showing up](https://fathom.video/share/NfT9QsENs6wmmquZJkh4Rmcc1p1HQPUt?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Room for improvement in older articles; refreshing content expected to drive better performance](https://fathom.video/share/NfT9QsENs6wmmquZJkh4Rmcc1p1HQPUt?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)

### Content Enhancement Strategies

  - [Plan to add graphics, infographics, and workflow visuals to high-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/NfT9QsENs6wmmquZJkh4Rmcc1p1HQPUt?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [Explore adding video content and podcast embeds to increase engagement](https://fathom.video/share/NfT9QsENs6wmmquZJkh4Rmcc1p1HQPUt?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [Focus on enhancing top 10 articles based on clicks and average position](https://fathom.video/share/NfT9QsENs6wmmquZJkh4Rmcc1p1HQPUt?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [Improve internal linking strategy for both SEO and non-SEO pages](https://fathom.video/share/NfT9QsENs6wmmquZJkh4Rmcc1p1HQPUt?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)

### Metrics and CTAs

  - [Continuing work on metrics articles; balancing with RAG and AI agents focus](https://fathom.video/share/NfT9QsENs6wmmquZJkh4Rmcc1p1HQPUt?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Waiting on CTA maps from Conor; e-book launch for AI agents happening soon](https://fathom.video/share/NfT9QsENs6wmmquZJkh4Rmcc1p1HQPUt?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [Discussion on inline CTAs to be continued next week](https://fathom.video/share/NfT9QsENs6wmmquZJkh4Rmcc1p1HQPUt?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)

### Security Topics

  - [Recent jailbreak event highlighted potential for LLM security content](https://fathom.video/share/NfT9QsENs6wmmquZJkh4Rmcc1p1HQPUt?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [Planning brainstorming session with Mert to explore security-related topics](https://fathom.video/share/NfT9QsENs6wmmquZJkh4Rmcc1p1HQPUt?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)

## Next Steps
